description: Speculative blast radius from seed node ids (what would this touch?). Returns a summary (counts by distance, the distance-1 ring, risk crossings); pass full=true for every impacted node with its hop chain.

full.description:
`true` returns every impacted node with its full hop chain. The default
is a summary — counts by distance, the distance-1 ring, risk crossings —
because the full dump on a large design overflows what a session can
read, and every band is still counted in the summary.

seed_ids.description: Seed node ids to propagate impact from.

name: propagate_from
